title: Resolution Extending Deep Sympathy and Condolences to the Family, Relatives and Friends of Former Board Member and Pcl President Jeffrey Alban Palce of Barangay Antipolo, Rizal, Laguna Who Passed Away Last July 6, 2021. (AUTHOR(S): Hon. Janos S. Lapiz, Hon. Geronimo A. Ciceron, Hon. Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Hon. Mark Lester B. Dizon, Hon. Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Hon. Rodora P. Loares, Hon. Arlene P. Delos Santos, 07/12/2021)
